User.title: User
User.description: A user of the GastoClaro application.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

ExpenseReport.title: ExpenseReport
ExpenseReport.description: A categorized expense report generated by AI.

id.description: The unique identifier of the report.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this report.

updatedAt.description: When the report was last updated.

sourceText.description: The original text input by the user.

raw_items.description: Raw items extracted from the text.

total_amount.description: The total amount of all expenses.

highest_category.description: The category with the highest total amount.

monthReference.description: The month and year this report refers to (e.g., '2023-10').

/users/{userId}/reports/{reportId}.description: Stores expense reports for a specific user.
